label: Transparent Carpenter Bee motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated Carpenter Bee motif for a design-system catalog: a complete carpenter bee, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A realistic carpenter bee with a sturdy compact body, glossy black abdomen and thorax, subtle violet-blue iridescent wings, dark jointed legs, fine antennae, accurate bee anatomy, clean recognizable silhouette, and a faint timber-workshop material mood only through the palette and surface sheen, not through props.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; side/top three-quarter view with full body, wings, legs, antennae, and wing edges visible without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves gloss black body structure, violet translucent wing sheen, small warm timber-brown reflected highlights, fine hair and segment detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no flowers, no wood beam as object, no landscape, no second insect, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Create a single extra-large 16:9 PNG design-system board at exact 3840 x 2160 canvas size.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive LIGHT MODE design-system board for "Morphous Carpenter Bee" / "Carpenter Bee", derived from the visible transparent carpenter bee motif.
Reference use: Extract the visual system from the motif: glossy black chitin, charcoal segment lines, violet translucent wings, blue-violet wing veins, timber-brown reflections, smoky wing-edge neutrals, sawdust ivory, and workbench gray.
Resolution and legibility: final image must be 3840x2160, wide 16:9, high-resolution source artwork, with oversized readable section labels and no dense microtext.
Layout: a precise product design board with 12 large labeled zones, not a landing page. Use a sturdy workspace SaaS design language, compact but readable.
Required visible sections: title and motif story; palette; English type; Japanese typography; components; navigation; dashboard/data; forms; tables; command/search; status states; design tokens covering texture, radius, spacing, shadows, border, focus ring.
Components to include: icon buttons, primary/secondary/destructive buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command palette/search overlay, sidebar/top navigation, charts, empty/loading/error states.
Japanese text: include short readable labels such as 作業台, 検索, 状態, 設定, 表, 完了, 進行中.
Style details: shadcn/tweakcn compatible, clean realistic UI mockup, light background, black chitin borders, subtle timber-grain dividers, violet focus rings, bronze-brown hover states, all UI radius 8px or less.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradient background, no random brand names, no watermark, no tiny illegible token table, no misspellings, no decorative hero, no rounded controls above 8px.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Create a single extra-large 16:9 PNG design-system board at exact 3840 x 2160 canvas size.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for "Morphous Carpenter Bee" / "Carpenter Bee". It must feel like the same system as the visible light-mode Carpenter Bee board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Input images: Use the visible transparent Carpenter Bee motif and the visible light-mode design-system board as references. Preserve the same palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, and typography.
Resolution and legibility: final image must be 3840x2160, wide 16:9, high-resolution source artwork, with oversized readable section labels and no dense microtext.
Layout: a precise product design board with 12 large labeled zones, not a landing page. Use a sturdy workspace SaaS design language, compact but readable.
Required visible sections: title and motif story; palette; English type; Japanese typography; components; navigation; dashboard/data; forms; tables; command/search; status states; design tokens covering texture, radius, spacing, shadows, border, focus ring.
Components to include: icon buttons, primary/secondary/destructive buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command palette/search overlay, sidebar/top navigation, charts, empty/loading/error states.
Japanese text: include short readable labels such as 作業台, 検索, 状態, 設定, 表, 完了, 進行中.
Style details: shadcn/tweakcn compatible, clean realistic UI mockup, deep gloss-black and charcoal background derived from the bee abdomen, smoky wing-edge card surfaces, violet-blue focus rings and active states, timber-brown hover/action states, subtle timber-grain dividers, all UI radius 8px or less.
Color palette: use motif-derived dark mode colors only: gloss black, deep graphite, charcoal, violet translucent wing, blue-violet veins, warm timber brown, sawdust ivory text, smoky wing gray, muted workbench gray. Strong but not neon contrast.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black empty background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradient background, no random brand names, no watermark, no tiny illegible token table, no misspellings, no decorative hero, no UI element radius above 8px.
